equipment.name: Connoisseur of Pain
equipment.desc: Each "Power through Pain" token that is assigned to the model or its attached unit may select a second ability assigned to it.

equipment.name: Scarlet Epicurean
equipment.desc: All to wound rolls against the model suffer a -1 penalty. Unique.

equipment.name: Spirit-Sting
equipment.desc: One weapon of the model gains the "Soul burn(5+)" ability. Unique.
